summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Ten hydrated open PRs were classified conservatively as independent inventory items, one hydrated PR was routed to security because it directly concerns API key persistence, and fifteen refs need human/refreshed hydration because the preflight artifact has unavailable live state from GitHub API rate limits.
